M

main(String[]) - Static method in class controller.MenuController
 
main(String[]) - Static method in class controller.SimController
Runs the simGUI viewer launch method.
main(String[]) - Static method in class view.MenuGUI
Runs the menuGUI viewer.
main(String[]) - Static method in class view.SimGUI
Runs the SimGUI viewer.
meneSaliin() - Static method in class simulation.Customer
Increases the amount of people in the performance-room by 1.
MenuController - Class in controller
Handles interfacing between the GUI and the model.
MenuController() - Constructor for class controller.MenuController
 
MenuGUI - Class in view
 
MenuGUI() - Constructor for class view.MenuGUI
 
merch - Variable in class controller.MenuController
Variable that records the amount of workers in Merch.
merch - Variable in class simulation.Controller
Service points for the different services in the simulation, each service point has a certain number of employees that can serve customers.
merchField - Variable in class controller.MenuController
TextField that takes the value for the amount of workers in Merch.
merchQueue - Variable in class simulation.Controller
Queues for the different service points and the arrival queue.
merchTime - Variable in class simulation.Customer
Customer class has a securityTime-value that stores the amount of time it took for it to go through the security check, a cloakroomTime-value that stores the amount of time it took for it to go through the cloakroom and a merchTime-value that stores the amount of time it took for it to go through the merch store.
moveQueue(boolean) - Static method in class simulation.Arrival
 
moveStep() - Method in class simulation.Customer
Increases a Customer-instance's x-value and y-value toward TargetX-value and TargetY-value.
moveTo(double, double) - Method in class simulation.Customer
Sets a Customer-instance's targetX-value and targetY-value based on the given parameters.
